name: @almadar/shell-hono
description: Minimal full-stack shell template for Almadar applications (Hono server)

scripts.build: bun run --filter @app/shared build && bun run --filter @app/client build && bun run --filter @app/server build
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
